about.title: About Me
about.summary: Systems and Computer Engineering graduate focused on offensive and defensive cybersecurity. Experience in software development and AI research. Passionate about continuous learning and building secure technology for the world.

items.description: Planned the infrastructure and ecosystem for IoT systems based on DDS.

Reviewed and updated GDPR-based cybersecurity audit questions at a global level, verifying regulatory compliance in organizations with international operations. Coordinated evidence collection across 4 concurrent HIPAA, SOC 2, and NIST audit engagements for world wide clients, validating control documentation and ensuring alignment with each framework's compliance requirements.

Built automated backends using FastAPI, PostgreSQL, and Google Apps Script to manage form data, automate over 700 weekly emails, and integrate workflows across Microsoft Forms, spreadsheets, and Outlook for ~700 active users. Optimized digital operations, reducing response time by 30% and eliminating 99% of manual errors in key administrative tasks.
Guided over 270 students across four courses, with emphasis on Communications Infrastructure and IT in Organizations, fostering a collaborative problem-solving mindset in labs and tutoring sessions.

courses: Relevant Courses: Network Defense and Cybersecurity, Cryptographic Engineering, Cloud Security.

items.degree: Bachelor's in Systems and Computer Engineering
activities: ML Engineer at Sinfonía Uniandes & Full-stack Developer at SpaceTech AESS UniAndes
